exercises.title: Provider Comparison Matrix
exercises.description: Create a comprehensive comparison of cloud quantum providers for a specific use case.
tasks: Research current specifications for IBM Quantum, Amazon Braket, and Azure Quantum
Create a comparison table with: max qubits, hardware types, pricing, SDKs
Identify which provider is best for: (a) VQE chemistry, (b) QAOA optimization, (c) QML research
Document the free tier limitations for each provider
Write a recommendation for a startup with limited budget
exercises.expectedOutput: Comparison document with tables and justified recommendations
hints: Check official documentation for latest specifications
Consider both hardware quality and queue times
Free tiers often have significant limitations
Trapped ions excel at all-to-all connectivity algorithms

exercises.title: Provider SDK Setup
exercises.description: Set up authentication and basic connectivity for multiple cloud quantum providers.
tasks: Create an IBM Quantum account and save credentials using QiskitRuntimeService
Configure AWS credentials for Amazon Braket access
List available backends from IBM Quantum with their qubit counts
List available devices from Amazon Braket with pricing information
Write a function that returns the best available backend based on qubit requirements

exercises.title: Cost Estimation Calculator
exercises.description: Build a cost estimation tool for quantum workloads across providers.
tasks: Implement cost calculation for IBM Quantum (time-based)
Implement cost calculation for Amazon Braket (per-shot + per-task)
Implement cost calculation for IonQ on Azure (per-gate pricing)
Create a comparison function that estimates costs across all providers
Add support for batch job discounts where applicable
exercises.starterCode:
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Dict

@dataclass
class QuantumJob:
    circuit_depth: int
    num_qubits: int
    shots: int
    estimated_runtime_seconds: float

def estimate_ibm_cost(job: QuantumJob, tier: str = 'premium') -> float:

    # Premium: $1.60/second

def estimate_braket_cost(job: QuantumJob, device: str) -> float:

    # Device-specific pricing
    pass

def compare_costs(job: QuantumJob) -> Dict[str, float]:

exercises.expectedOutput: Cost calculator with accurate estimates for different providers
hints: IBM charges per second of runtime
Braket has per-shot and per-task components
IonQ uses per-gate pricing on some platforms

exercises.title: Provider Selection Algorithm
exercises.description: Implement an intelligent provider selection system based on job requirements.
tasks: Define a requirements specification format (qubits, fidelity, connectivity, budget)
Score each provider against the requirements
Factor in current queue times and availability
Implement fallback logic when primary provider is unavailable
Add support for hybrid workloads spanning multiple providers
exercises.expectedOutput: Intelligent provider selection system with scoring and fallbacks
hints: Weight factors based on requirement priorities
Query real-time queue status when possible
